Ku"a 26 Sani Chandra Guru
suCra 22

98 Rectification of Birth Time
Trotsky's Venus is in the third house. Our sixth chart is
that of Charls 1 of England. In this sixth, we have all planets
from the second to the fifth. Venus is at the end. Venus
indicates a way of acting in which ideal things are more
important. Here we find an undue emphasis on relaxation and
satisfaction, or on repudiation and ultimate distaste. How the
native looks at things, engages them, and.gives them meaning
and value-these are some of the things depending on Venus.
Those who have Venus alone in the tenth house will make
capital of the aesthetic talents in the sphere of motion pic
tures. Here in the cases of Troksky and Charles I we find how
Venus has given a dramatic significance to their lives.
The Moon is prominent in the chart ofNapolean and the
Moon indicates a way of acting in a wholly unashamed self
interest, the feelings of the individual and how he responds to
